series_metadata.series_title: Ohio State Highway Patrol (OSP) Non-Criminal Request For Service (RFS)
series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains requests for service/assistance that are non-criminal in nature (e.g., request for a phone number for an abandoned vehicle, next of kin request or simple traffic violation; tips and leads or reports of suspicious behavior that do not meet the standard for a Suspicious Activity Report (SAR) or criminal request for service (RFS)).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in electronic data-system five (5) years and
